subcodes.first_line: O Nabil, son of Nabil! There hath come before the Wronged One that which thou didst send unto the Name of the All-Bountiful, who was drawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل بن نبیل قد حضر لدی المظلوم ما ارسلته الی اسم الجواد الذی انجذب من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
